description_long: This object is a heavy-duty concrete jersey barrier, commonly used for traffic control and safety in urban environments. Its surface is predominantly gray, with a weathered, rough texture and visible signs of use. Both long faces feature diagonal yellow and black hazard stripes, serving as high-visibility warning markings. The top edge is slightly beveled, and two metal lifting hooks are embedded for transport. The base is wider than the top, providing stability, and the overall form is monolithic and solid. The barrier shows minor scuffs and surface wear, typical of outdoor exposure and frequent handling.
description: A solid gray concrete jersey barrier with yellow and black hazard stripes, metal lifting hooks, and a weathered, rough surface.
description_view_0: Narrow end view showing the triangular profile and the thickness of the concrete, with hazard stripes visible along the edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrier, prominent yellow and black diagonal stripes, and two metal lifting hooks on top.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow end view, mirroring view 0, with the same triangular profile and visible hazard stripes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full length, hazard stripes, and lifting hooks.
